_comment: Test expectations for citation_validator. Each case maps a BibTeX key to its expected verification status. 'expected' may be a string or list of acceptable statuses. Run via: python tests/run_validation_suite.py

mutated.description: Broad probe set: parser edge cases, DOI normalization, status determination, fabrication detection.

cases.probes: Clean control: real DOI + real authors + real title
Year mismatch detection (single issue)
Real DOI + completely fabricated authors must be FABRICATED
Initials-only given names must NOT trigger PARTIAL_MATCH
Invented DOI
Whitespace-padded DOI must still be parsed and queried
DOI given as full URL must be normalized and resolved
No DOI + fake title must NOT silently VERIFY
Empty entry must NOT silently VERIFY
LaTeX accents in author names should not break matching
Nested braces in title must be parsed correctly
Multi-line author field with trailing comma must parse

manual_author_edits.description: Author-edit fraud probes (regression for the originally-reported user bug).

cases.probes: Control. Author check must pass; title is short so a TITLE_MISMATCH WARNING is acceptable.
cases.notes: Probe titles are intentionally short ('TravisTorrent') so author logic is the variable under test.

cases.probes: 1 of 3 authors swapped: must be flagged (PARTIAL_MATCH or worse)
All 3 authors fully replaced: must be FABRICATED
Subtle fraud: given names kept, last names swapped: must be FABRICATED
Real authors plus 1 fake prepended: must be flagged
Single-char typo on last name: should match (similarity >= 0.9 threshold)
Given names reduced to initials: author check must pass
Author order shuffled: order-independent matching must pass

real_world_stable.description: Stable real-world cases pulled from example_references_1.bib. Tests integration with live CrossRef / doi.org / Semantic Scholar.

cases.probes: Real DOI + initials-only authors: end-to-end verification
DOI returns 404 from both CrossRef and doi.org Handle
DOI resolves but to a different paper than claimed
Another confirmed-404 DOI
No DOI book entry must not silently VERIFY
